purpose: Proof that transparent illustrated ornament assets can close the visual gap in a real app layout without generated UI, fixed frames, or complex masking.

slots.name: header_village_vignette
slots.responsiveRule: scale to 70-92 percent of viewport width, keep right edge within 24px bleed

safeContentRegion.description: left 40 percent and foreground controls must remain readable

slots.requiredAlphaBehavior: scenery must fade through transparent pixels at left, bottom, and outer foliage edges
failureModes: text or UI chrome baked into the asset

slots.name: bottom_scroll_foliage
slots.responsiveRule: full content width with decorative bleed; never position fixed

safeContentRegion.description: center column from x=92 to x=338 remains low-alpha so text/cards can pass above it

slots.requiredAlphaBehavior: asset is transparent around all edges and can scroll into and out of view as normal content

slots.name: action_icon_calendar

safeContentRegion.description: entire icon must remain legible at 44px with no external label dependency

slots.requiredAlphaBehavior: transparent background, no accidental filter rectangle
failureModes: generic lucide-style icon with no hand-drawn craft
painterly detail that turns muddy at UI size
